expected_properties: Outputs remain 0 while reset is asserted regardless of input changes
additional_cases.goal: Confirm that reset overrides edge detection and forces outputs low.
notes: Even if a toggles during reset, rise/down must stay 0.
preconditions: Reset is active low and asserted.
stimulus_intent: Assert reset, toggle a, then deassert reset
timing_assumptions: Wait at least two clock cycles after deasserting reset before checking outputs.

expected_properties: Repeated identical stimulus sequences produce identical observed output sequences
additional_cases.goal: Establish deterministic behavior across multiple runs of the same stimulus.
stimulus_intent: Apply the pattern 0->1->0->1->0 on a over successive cycles
timing_assumptions: Observe outputs with one-cycle latency after each transition.

expected_properties: rise output asserted only on rising edge of a
down output asserted only on falling edge of a
baseline_case_enrichments.goal: Validate that single-bit edge detection correctly asserts rise/down for isolated transitions.
notes: Observe that outputs return to 0 in the cycle after being asserted if no new edge occurs.
stimulus_intent: Toggle input a from 0 to 1 and back to 0 with at least one idle cycle between transitions
timing_assumptions: Observe outputs one clock cycle after input transition; no fixed latency beyond one cycle is assumed.
